title: Book Of Nonsense Limerick 94.
content:
There was an Old Person of Cheadle,
    Was put in the stocks by the beadle;
    For stealing some pigs,
    Some coats, and some wigs,
    That horrible Person of Cheadle.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Lear, titled "Book Of Nonsense Limerick 94.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
